sections.title: Database Project Showcase
sections: A collection of database and data-management systems designed for structured storage, synchronization, automation support, and cross-application data access across multiple platforms and technologies.

items.title: Themadhoods Rates Database
description: Central rate and pricing database for Themadhood projects.
Stored in Google Sheets and managed through a Google App.
about: Themadhoods Rates DB keeps pricing, rate rules, and estimate-related values in one shared database.
Applications and automations can read from this database instead of hardcoding pricing information in separate tools.

items.title: Prism Bloom Exercise Event Database
description: Main event database for Prism Bloom Exercise.
Stores event information that can be reused by apps and automations.
about: PBE Event DB is the structured event data source for Prism Bloom Exercise.
It is stored in Google Sheets, managed through a Google App, and designed so other tools can read event data without duplicating it.
